meta.title: Autonomous Hiring — AI Recruiting Team
meta.description: A self-driving AI recruiting team — from sourcing to outreach, analysis, and interview coordination.

hero.headline: Hiring is becoming autonomous
hero.lead:
Not tools. Not workflows.
A self-driving AI recruiting team — from sourcing to outreach, analysis, and interview coordination.
hero.aside: Signal-driven decisions, continuous motion, and human judgment where it matters — not in the gaps between tools.

items.title: It’s reactive
items.body: Action happens only when needed. You’re not always knowing who matters until the moment has passed.

items.title: It’s fragmented
items.body: Sourcing, outreach, screening, coordination — disconnected and uncoordinated across people and software.

items.title: It’s human-limited
items.body: Even top recruiters can’t operate 24/7. Capacity becomes the ceiling on quality and speed.

paradigm.line2: It’s a system of decisions, signals, and timing.

roles.name: Scout
roles.title: Talent Discovery
roles.desc: Always-on radar. Finds talent before you search.

roles.name: Reach
roles.title: Outreach Specialist
roles.desc: Starts conversations. Follows up and persuades.

roles.name: Analyst
roles.title: Talent Intelligence
roles.desc: Deep research, structured evaluation — automatically ranks candidates.

roles.name: Strategist
roles.title: Market Intelligence
roles.desc: Tracks the talent market. Alerts you before others.

how.title: Always running. Always learning. Always moving.
how.note: Full collaboration across agents, with feedback-driven optimization at every loop.

user.title: You don’t run the process — you guide the system
bullets: Train agent judgment on what “great” looks like for your company.
Approve key decisions at the moments that shape outcomes.
Adjust strategy as markets, roles, and priorities shift.

layers.text: monitors talent and market trends continuously.
builds complete candidate profiles from scattered evidence.
selects top candidates and suggests the next best actions.

items.title: Runs 24/7
items.body: The team doesn’t sleep — discovery and follow-through continue between your meetings.

items.title: Multi-channel outreach
items.body: Coordinated touchpoints instead of a single brittle channel or template blast.

items.title: Market-aware decisions
items.body: Strategy shifts with real labor-market signals, not static playbooks.

items.title: Learns from your feedback
items.body: Every approval, pass, and edit tightens judgment — the system compounds with you.
